jobs.title: Social Media Intern - Sports Marketing
jobs.description:
Do you love sports and consider social media your playground? 
 At OTC, we’re building a marketing agency fully dedicated to basketball—and we need you to help us do it. As a Social Media Intern, you won’t just be tagging along: you’ll work with us to build a community from the ground up that lives and breathes the sport. 
 This isn’t an internship where you run errands. You’ll be given real responsibility, contribute creatively, and see firsthand the impact of your work. 
 Location : Remote | Start : Immediately | Duration : 3–6 months | Compensation : Unpaid 
 Type : Mandatory internship or voluntary internship (up to 3 months) 
 Aufgaben 
 
 Develop a strategy : You’ll design a social media strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms—from target audience analysis to content planning 
 Create content : You’ll produce Reels, TikToks, Stories, and posts that resonate with the basketball community 
 Build a community : You’ll interact with fans, players, and teams to build an engaged following 
 Identify trends : You’ll keep your finger on the pulse of the basketball and social media worlds and bring fresh ideas to the table 
 Evaluate performance : You’ll track KPIs, analyze what works, and continuously optimize 
 
 Qualifikation 
 
 You’re a pro at creating content (Reels, short videos, graphics)—even your personal work counts 
 A keen sense of social media trends, especially on TikTok and Instagram 
 Creativity, initiative, and a desire to build things from scratch 
 Basic knowledge of tools like Canva, CapCut, or similar programs 
 A genuine passion for sports (ideally basketball)—whether as a fan, player, or both 
 Enrolled in a college or university (for a mandatory internship) or available for up to 3 months (voluntary internship) 
 Fluent in English ; good German is a plus 
 
 Benefits 
 
 Startup experience from day one – No corporate rat race, just real creative freedom 
 Access to the world of basketball – Connections with players, teams, and the German basketball scene 
 Steep learning curve – Direct responsibility for a brand in its early stages 
 100% remote – Work from anywhere 
 Official internship certificate and, upon request, a recommendation on LinkedIn🤝 
 Opportunities – With good performance, there is the possibility of long-term employment

We respond quickly to customer needs, implement ideas seamlessly, and create added value through our innovations. In doing so, we are increasingly building ecosystems that solve the challenges of today and tomorrow.

 In this role, you will help enhance and automate ESG (Environment, Social, Governance) reporting processes, particularly in line with the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) including EU Taxonomy, and contribute to improving ESG ratings and rankings (e.g. EcoVadis, CDP.

 Degree in Data Science, Computer Science or Sustainability Management with a focus on or proven skills in Data Science, Computer Science

 At least 2-3 years of professional experience 
 Helpful is a good to deep understanding and knowledge of ESG frameworks and standards (e.g., CSRD, EU Taxonomy); familiarity with ESG ratings and rankings is a plus 
 Good communication skills and experience in stakeholder engagement 
 Excellent analytical skills, independent, structured, and solution-oriented working style 
 Fluent in English; German is a plus

 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits

jobs.title: SEO & AI Search Lead
jobs.description:
Who we are 
 Softr is the first AI-native platform for building business apps such as internal tools and client portals, without any code. 
 If you’re interested in being on the cutting edge of technology and advancing your career at a fast-growing, lean, impact-driven company, then read on… 
 We launched Softr in 2020 with a single vision: to give 1 billion business users the ability to build the tools they need — without relying on developers, without learning to code. 
 Softr is now powering over 1 million builders worldwide - including companies like Netflix, Google, Stripe, UPS, and Clay, who build and run the systems that power their business operations. 
 We’re a fully remote, distributed, and diverse team of curious, ambitious, and driven individuals. 
 Who we're looking for 
 Search is being rewritten in real time. Google still drives intent, but a growing share of buyers now ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude before they ever land on a website and what those models say about Softr directly shapes our pipeline. As our SEO & AI Search Lead , you will own organic performance end to end: traffic, signups, and share of voice in AI answers. Your job is to make Softr the most-recommended, most-cited, and most-accurately-described platform in our category, across both classic search and the AI layer on top of it. 
 You will report to the Head of Marketing and work closely with Content, Product Marketing, Engineering, and Brand. This is a high-ownership role with executive visibility you will set the roadmap, run the playbook, and make the calls on where we invest next. 
 Tasks 
 Your responsibilities 
 
 Own organic growth: Drive SEO and AEO/AIO performance across traffic, signups, and share of voice in AI answers you set the targets and you hit them. 
 Set and run the roadmap: From keyword and prompt research to publishing priorities, programmatic systems, and link strategy you decide what we ship and in what order. 
 Reposition Softr in LLMs: Move us off "no-code portal builder" and into accurate, current positioning across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. Track it in Profound, close citation gaps, and engineer the content patterns LLMs actually quote. 
 Lead technical and programmatic SEO: Site health, indexation, Core Web Vitals, schema, and internal linking plus scoping programmatic page systems with engineering and managing quality at scale. 
 Build link, citation, and Reddit authority: Drive link and citation building across owned, earned, and partner channels, with a deliberate Reddit strategy that earns mentions LLMs and Google both trust. 
 Partner, report, and pitch new bets: Brief Content on structure and on-page, report monthly on SEO/AEO performance, flag risks early, and translate algorithm and LLM behavior changes into actions for the team 
 
 Requirements 
 What you bring to the table 
 
 Proven organic track record: 5+ years in SEO with concrete wins you can point to meaningful traffic, signup, or revenue lifts at a SaaS or product-led company. 
 AEO/AIO fluency: You've actively worked on getting cited in AI answers, not just read about it. Hands-on with Profound or equivalent tooling, and a clear point of view on what makes LLMs quote one source over another. 
 Reddit and citation building (must-have): You understand how Reddit ranks, how it feeds both Google and LLM answers, and you've earned visibility there without burning the community. 
 Technical SEO chops: You can talk shop with engineers on indexation, rendering, schema, and Core Web Vitals and ship fixes, not just file tickets. 
 Programmatic SEO experience: You've designed and scaled page systems that hold up on quality, not just volume. 
 Analytical and outcome-driven: Comfortable with GSC, GA, Ahrefs/Semrush, BigQuery, and whatever tool answers the question fastest. You measure what matters and ignore vanity metrics. 
 Curiosity and adaptability: The search landscape is shifting monthly — you stay on top of algorithm and LLM behavior changes and turn them into action, not anxiety. 
 High ownership and grit: You operate like a founder of your function. You don't wait for direction, and you finish what you start. 
 Sharp written communication: You can brief content teams, pitch leadership, and write the kind of clear copy that both humans and LLMs reward. 
 
 Benefits 
 Why is Softr the best place to work? 
 
 Fast-growing company and opportunity to make an impact on a large scale. 
 Competitive salary and equity options. 
 Fully remote and flexible work schedule. 
 High ownership, zero bureaucracy. Lean team, get-things-done mindset. 
 Annual company retreat and team gatherings. 
 Work directly with the founders and leadership team. 
 Our customers love Softr (1M+ users and growing)! A daily dose of customer love and positive feedback that rewards your work. 
 Backed by the best - we are well-resourced, profitable, and backed by best investors, like FirstMark Capital and the world’s best angel investors like Gokul Rajaram , Scott Belsky , Brian Balfour , Cristina Cordova and more (check out the full list here).

jobs.title: Marketing Analyst
jobs.description:
Custom Surgical builds hardware and software that changes how ophthalmic surgeons document, teach, and perform. Our MicroREC ecosystem, used by surgeons in 80+ countries, turns surgical microscopes into professional imaging and recording stations. MicroREC 3D, our latest system, delivers stereoscopic 3D visualization for cataract, vitreoretinal, and corneal surgery. 
 We're a small, ambitious team operating at the intersection of medtech and software. Everyone here owns real outcomes and builds things that end up in operating rooms around the world. 
 Tasks 
 We're looking for a Marketing Analyst to take ownership of the campaigns, content, and operational workflows that drive Custom Surgical's visibility and pipeline. You'll sit above our junior Marketing Analyst and work directly with the Head of Growth to execute the marketing plan across digital, events, and content channels. 
 This is a hands-on execution role with real ownership. You won't just support, you'll plan, build, run, and improve. One week you're optimizing a Google Ads campaign for a new MicroREC bundle launch, the next you're coordinating event logistics for ESCRS or DOC, the next you're briefing a content piece for a surgical audience. If you like owning the full marketing stack and seeing your work translate into leads and revenue, this role is for you. 
 What you'll own 
 Campaigns & Paid Media 
 
 Plan and execute digital campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, and LinkedIn — targeting surgeons, residents, and clinical decision-makers 
 Monitor performance, run A/B tests, and optimize toward pipeline metrics (leads, MQLs, cost per acquisition) 
 Build and manage segmented email campaigns and automated nurture flows in HubSpot 
 
 Content & SEO 
 
 Execute the content calendar: blog posts, case studies, surgical video captions, surgeon testimonials, and product-focused landing pages 
 Own on-page SEO and contribute to keyword strategy and technical health improvements 
 Brief and review content produced by Kevin or external collaborators, ensuring quality and brand consistency 
 
 Events & Conference Support 
 
 Coordinate marketing logistics for international ophthalmology congresses (ESCRS, DOC, SICSSO, AAO, and others): materials, shipping, booth collateral, lead capture setup 
 Support on-site execution at key events when needed 
 Manage post-event follow-up workflows in HubSpot 
 
 Analytics & Reporting 
 
 Track and report weekly and monthly performance across channels: traffic, leads, conversion rates, campaign ROI 
 Maintain dashboards and flag issues or opportunities to the Head of Growth 
 Contribute to sales and marketing alignment by keeping HubSpot pipeline data clean and actionable 
 
 Team Coordination 
 
 Manage day-to-day tasks with Kevin, briefing projects clearly and reviewing outputs 
 Collaborate with Sales and Customer Success to align messaging and support commercial priorities 
 Work cross-functionally with Product to translate technical features into marketing-ready content 
 
 Requirements 
 Required 
 
 2–4 years of experience in a marketing role, ideally in B2B, medtech, healthtech, or a technical product company 
 Hands-on experience running paid campaigns (Google Ads required; Meta and/or LinkedIn a plus) 
 Proficiency with HubSpot or a comparable CRM/marketing automation platform 
 English C1 - other languages is a plus. 
 Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously without losing quality 
 Based in Munich 
 
 Preferred 
 
 Experience marketing to healthcare professionals or in a regulated industry 
 Familiarity with SEO tools (Semrush, Ahrefs, or similar) 
 Background in event coordination or congress marketing 
 
 Benefits 
 
 Real ownership from day one: You run campaigns and projects, not just support them 
 A lean, international team where your work is visible and your impact is measurable 
 Direct exposure to the medtech world: clinical content, surgical audiences, global congresses 
 Flexible working arrangements + home office when needed 
 Wellpass or Deutschlandticket 
 No unnecessary bureaucracy — high autonomy, fast decisions, direct feedback 
 
 We expect protagonists: people who spot a problem and fix it without waiting to be told. We give and receive direct feedback often. We're a young, international team that moves fast and takes ownership seriously. If that's the environment where you do your best work, we'd like to talk.

jobs.title: Reconciliation Analyst
jobs.description:
Our partner, a globally recognized leader in asset management, is expanding its Global Operations by opening a brand-new hub in Budapest. They are driven by a mission to deliver superior financial outcomes through disciplined investments and world-class service. To support this exciting expansion, we are looking for a highly motivated Reconciliations Analyst to ensure the seamless operation of Investment Accounting reconciliation processes across multiple asset classes. 
 
 
 Daily Reconciliations: Perform and oversee daily cash, position, transaction, and market value reconciliations (including IBOR, PBOR, and ABOR vs. IBOR) to ensure absolute data integrity. 
 
 
 Break Resolution: Proactively investigate, analyze, and resolve reconciliation breaks, escalating complex issues according to established control frameworks. 
 
 
 Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams (Corporate Actions, Pricing, Trade Support) and liaise with external service providers (custodians, fund accountants) to validate data and resolve discrepancies. 
 
 
 Process Optimization: Identify control gaps, recurring issues, or process inefficiencies, and actively participate in system enhancements and operational projects. 
 
 
 Regulatory Compliance: Adhere to internal policies and external regulatory requirements, ensuring all reconciliations are completed within defined SLAs. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent work experience) in a relevant financial or business field. 
 
 Experience across the full spectrum of investment accounting and reconciliation processes (cash, position custody, and market value reconciliations). 
 
 Excellent written and verbal English skills, with the ability to build trust and communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels. 
 
 Familiarity with reconciliation platforms (such as TriResolve) and a strong understanding of accounting standards. 
 
 
 A solid grasp of operational risk, control frameworks, and regulatory requirements within financial services. 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 Our Partner doesn’t just invest in markets, they invest in you. Expect a culture that values diversity and rewards excellence. 
 
 Competitive salary package 
 Chance to join a new project and be a foundation member 
 Work-Life Harmony: Hybrid working model 
 Opportunity to join programs and courses that support professional development 
 Opportunity to be part of a truly international organizational across several continents 
 Other benefits - apply if you want to hear more!

jobs.title: Finance Analytics Developer
jobs.description:
Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
   
 Organisation/Department 
 Our client is a leading independent provider of IT infrastructure services, with about 20,000 employees worldwide. They work at the heart of digitisation, advising organisations on IT strategy, implementing the most appropriate technology and managing their customers’ infrastructures. 
 They offer a friendly, open working environment without too much fuss about hierarchy. They are looking for professionals with diverse competencies, personalities and strengths who want to live our shared value of teamwork and performance. 
 Job description 
 
 Drive process improvements and automation initiatives within the Finance Reporting & Business Process Development Team 
 Act as a trusted advisor in key transformation initiatives, implementing solutions within established designs and standards 
 Modernise legacy automations by reverse-engineering existing Excel/VBA solutions and implementing replacements using modern automation tools 
 Build resilient automated workflows with robust error handling, logging, and clear recovery steps to minimise manual intervention 
 Develop and maintain processing bots (using VBA and/or Python) to support high-volume Finance processes , including SAP data extraction and processing 
 Deliver through Agile execution by picking up scoped tickets from the backlog, implementing clean and documented logic, and supporting testing/release into production 
 Collaborate closely with the Lead Analytics Engineer and BI Developer as part of the build stream
 
 
 Requirements 
 
 Hybrid Profile: A solid background in Finance and Controlling combined with a "Builder" mindset and a strong passion for technology 
 Automation Pro: Tangible experience in automating business processes using low-code tools (such as Power Automate or Power Apps ) or scripting languages ( VBA, Python ) 
 VBA Expertise: Ability to read and thoroughly understand existing VBA code, translating its logic into more maintainable and modern solutions 
 Advanced Data Handling: Comfortable managing SAP extracts and complex datasets with Power Query (including structuring, validating, and troubleshooting data) 
 Problem-Solving Skills: Strong debugging and root-cause thinking abilities; you don't just report issues, you proactively prevent their recurrence 
 
 Benefits 
 
 
 SAP & Finance trainings 
 
 
 Language courses & talent programmes 
 
 
 Stable Career Path 
 
 
 Hybrid working way 
 
 
 Be part of a winning team with a clear purpose and a strategic plan in place  
 
 
 Medicare private health care package and cafeteria benefits 
 
 
 Information

 Hényel Dominika - dominika.henyel@randstad.hu

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Operations Coordinator – Regular/Afternoon shift
jobs.description:
Alpha is bringing their impressive global success story to Hungary, building a brand-new Global Business Center in Budapest. They are looking for a Talent Acquisition Operations Coordinator to join their People function and become a foundational part of this journey. 
 They offer a unique environment that prioritizes an inclusive culture and service excellence from day one. In this role, you will manage the operational backbone of the recruitment function within a collaborative, supportive, and social international team. 
   
 Shift Options 
 We are looking for candidates for the following two arrangements: 
 
 
 Standard Schedule: Working during local business hours. 
 
 
 Afternoon Shift (13:00 – 22:00): Bridging time zones and driving efficiency. You will serve as the vital link between our global regions, ensuring real-time support for international stakeholders and candidates. 
 
 
 As a key expert within the Business Services function, you won’t just manage administrative tasks—you’ll manage the digital and operational flow of the talent acquisition process on a global scale. You will oversee the candidate lifecycle, ensuring interview pipelines are seamless, data is spotless, and global scaling is supported by best-in-class technology and compliant processes. 
 Your Responsibilities: 
 
 
 Interview Coordination & Pipeline Orchestration: Manage end-to-end interview scheduling across multiple time zones, resolve conflicts, and track progress within the ATS. 
 
 
 Pre-Onboarding & Data Administration: Prepare and issue employment contracts and offer letters. Update systems (Workday) with "zero-error" precision and coordinate with HR for a successful first day. 
 
 
 Team Engagement & Strategic Collaboration: Regularly engage with TA Managers and People Business Partners to optimize the pipeline and share best practices. 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 BSc/MSc degree (Economics, Finance, or equivalent). 
 
 
 1–3 years of proven experience in a Recruitment Operations or HR Coordination role. 
 
 
 Hands-on experience with ATS and HRIS platforms (e.g., Greenhouse, Workday) and proficiency in MS Office. 
 
 
 Business language fluency in English. 
 
 
 Proactive, detail-oriented, and possessing strong interpersonal skills. 
 
 
   
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 Why Join Us in Budapest? 
   
 Financial Rewards & Security 
 
 
 Performance-Based Bonus 
 
 
 Cafeteria 
 
 
 Pension fund contribution 
 
 
 Life Insurance 
 
 
 Flexibility & Modern Workstyle 
 
 
 Hybrid Model: Enjoy the best of both worlds with a flexible schedule (usually 2-3 days in the office). 
 
 
 Home Office Support 
 
 
 Work from Abroad: Work from another country for up to 20 days per year to better sync your travel plans with your career. 
 
 
 Health & Wellbeing 
 
 
 Private Health Insurance 
 
 
 Mental Health Support 
 
 
 Inclusive Care: Dedicated support for special needs, including workplace accessibility and specific health considerations.

jobs.title: YouTube Content Producer (all genders)
jobs.company: Miss Germany Studios GmbH & Co. KG
jobs.description:
Wir bauen keinen weiteren Unternehmenskanal auf. Wir bauen einen YouTube-Kanal, der die Geschichten, Persönlichkeiten und Entwicklungen hinter Miss Germany sichtbar macht – für Hunderttausende Menschen. 
 Dafür suchen wir Menschen, die YouTube nicht nur konsumieren, sondern verstehen. Menschen, die sich fragen, warum ein Video 10 Millionen Views macht. Warum manche Geschichten Menschen bis zum Ende fesseln. Und wie man Formate entwickelt, die inspirieren, unterhalten und im Kopf bleiben. 
 Aufgaben 
 Als YouTube Content Producer bei Miss Germany Studios entwickelst du gemeinsam mit uns die nächste Generation von Female-Empowerment-Content. Du arbeitest an Formaten, die nahbar, unterhaltsam und relevant sind – und begleitest den gesamten Produktionsprozess von der ersten Idee bis zum fertigen Upload. 
 Qualifikation 
 Wir haben ein Match, wenn Folgendes auf dich zutrifft: 
 
 Du liebst YouTube. Wirklich. Du verbringst wahrscheinlich mehr Zeit auf YouTube als auf Netflix und analysierst ganz automatisch, warum Videos funktionieren. 
 Du denkst in Geschichten. Egal ob beim Dreh, im Schnitt oder bei der Planung – du suchst immer nach dem stärksten Spannungsbogen. 
 Du hast Creator-Energie. Du wartest nicht auf Briefings, sondern kommst mit Ideen. 
 Du erkennst gute Geschichten. Du siehst Potenzial in Menschen, Entwicklungen und Momenten, die andere übersehen. 
 Du übernimmst Ownership. Wenn etwas wichtig für das Video ist, verfolgst du es aktiv nach. Du wartest nicht auf Antworten, sondern sorgst dafür, dass sie kommen. Du denkst mit, gehst einen Schritt weiter und lässt wichtige Themen nicht liegen. 
 Du denkst in Universen statt in einzelnen Videos. Gemeinsam mit der Produktion unserer Serie entwickelst du Geschichten kanalübergreifend weiter und schaffst Verbindungen zwischen Serie, YouTube und den Menschen hinter Miss Germany. 
 
 Du möchtest etwas aufbauen. Nicht verwalten, sondern gestalten. 
 Benefits 
 Was wir bieten: 
 
 Build Something Big: Unser YouTube-Kanal ist bereits da – aber wir stehen erst am Anfang dessen, was möglich ist. Gemeinsam mit uns entwickelst du neue Formate, erzählst starke Geschichten und gestaltest den Kanal in einer entscheidenden Wachstumsphase aktiv mit. 
 Impact Driven: Wir unterstützen mit Herzblut Frauen bei ihrer persönlichen und beruflichen Weiterentwicklung und tragen zu einer vielfältigeren und gleichberechtigteren Gesellschaft bei. 
 Creator Playground: Wir geben dir den Freiraum, neue Formate zu entwickeln, Ideen auszuprobieren und gemeinsam mit uns herauszufinden, was Menschen wirklich bewegt. 
 Ownership statt Micromanagement: Viel Vertrauen, kurze Entscheidungswege und echte Verantwortung statt endloser Abstimmungsschleifen. 
 Remote First: Wir suchen vor allem in Köln und Oldenburg. Dein Arbeitsort ist flexibel – arbeite von dort, wo du am besten performst. Für dein Onboarding sowie regelmäßige Team- und Produktionstage kommst du nach Oldenburg in unser Head Office. 
 Work with Inspiring People: Du arbeitest mit beeindruckenden Frauen, spannenden Persönlichkeiten, Partnern und einem Netzwerk, das weit über Miss Germany hinausgeht. 
 Learn Fast: YouTube, Storytelling, Produktion, Community, Personal Brands, Medien und Unternehmertum – du wirst in kurzer Zeit unglaublich viel lernen. 
 Top Gear: Neueste Hardware (Apple) und moderne Tools für deine tägliche Arbeit. 
 Team Fun: Regelmäßige Team-Events und gemeinsame Erlebnisse – zuletzt waren wir Fallschirm springen. 
 
 Find Jobs in Germany on Arbeitnow

jobs.title: HR Intern
jobs.description:
As the world’s largest asset manager and a leading provider of financial technology, BlackRock’s purpose is to help more and more people experience financial well-being. Founded in 1988 and based in New York City, BlackRock operates globally, with more than 70 offices spanning 40 countries, and clients in over 100 countries. They opened their Budapest Innovation Hub in 2017, with the idea that technology and finance go hand-in-hand – something they’ve believed since their founding. As a firm and together with their clients, they work to create a more equitable and resilient world, today and for generations to come. 
 Feladatok:
 
 Support various HR teams with day-to-day operational and administrative activities 
 Contribute to ongoing HR projects and initiatives 
 Handle ad-hoc HR-related tasks 
 Participate in a structured rotational program with 4-month rotations across different HR functions 
 Provide full support to one designated HR team during each rotation period 
 Assist with employee-related processes and queries 
 
 During the rotational program, interns may have the opportunity to support the following teams (based on business needs): 
 
 Background Screening 
 Talent Acquisition Operations (TA Ops) 
 ContactHR (HR support team handling employee inquiries and HR processes) 
 Payroll 
 Talent Acquisition – Sourcing 
 Campus TA Operations (early careers / student recruitment) 
 Risk & Compliance 
 
 Rotations are determined by business requirements; therefore, placement in a preferred team cannot be guaranteed. Flexibility and openness to different HR areas are essential. 
 Elvárások:
 
 Pursuing a bachelor’s or master's degree preferably in HR, business management, economy 
 Fluency in written and spoken English is essential 
 High proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly in Excel and PowerPoint 
 General understanding of HR processes and strong interest in the HR profession 
 Strong interest in a career in HR 
 Excellent communication skills and a proactive mindset 
 Attention to detail and good time management 
 Motivated and eager to learn 
 Interest in AI tools and HR technology to explore how these can enhance HR processes 
 
 Munkaidő:
 
 Availability to work 30 hours per week 
 Starting date after a successfully completed background check 
 One-year internship with possible extension 
 
 Amit kínálunk:
 
 2550 Ft/hour in gross 
 Internship confirmation 
 Opportunity to partly work from home 
 Possibility to evolve and gain valuable experience 
 Potential to work towards a relevant professional qualification 
 
 If you are interested in this position, please fill out the form below and upload your English CV . We will contact you as soon as possible.

jobs.title: Procurement and Governance Specialist
jobs.description:
Our automotive partner is looking for their future colleague for the Procurement and Governance Specialist position. 
 Procurement and Supplier Management 
 
 
 Ensure all purchasing activities and supplier-related processes fully comply with internal governance, global and local policies, and audit requirements. 
 
 
 Maintain and continuously improve process documentation and work instructions to guarantee clarity, transparency, and process integrity. 
 
 
 Prepare tenders, evaluate offers, and provide fact-based analyses to support informed and transparent decision-making. 
 
 
 Build and maintain professional, trust-based relationships with suppliers and act as a reliable, independent interface between suppliers and internal departments, while ensuring consistent adherence to compliance and procurement standards. 
 
 
 Conduct market research and compile supplier performance data to support fair evaluations and informed sourcing decisions. 
 
 
 Governance & Continuous Improvement 
 
 
 Drive continuous improvement of companywide processes and governance frameworks, ensuring alignment with global policies and local requirements. 
 
 
 Identify process gaps and enable structured, data-driven improvements that strengthen compliance, efficiency, and organizational transparency. 
 
 
 Execution of controls in order to fulfill requirements of identified process gaps. 
 
 
 Alignment with Marketing Department 
 
 
 Reconcile the marketing budget in close cooperation with the Marketing and Controlling department, ensuring accuracy and transparent financial oversight. 
 
 
 Maintain and coordinate the Sponsorship / Donation database, ensuring full compliance with internal and corporate governance standards. 
 
 
 Compliance 
 
 
 Execute regular compliance controls (e.g., Expenditure Compliance Controls) with high diligence and transparency. 
 
 
 Act as CAS responsible for all new suppliers, ensuring strict adherence to compliance and due diligence requirements. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 University or college degree, with a minimum of two years of relevant experience. 
 
 
 Strong digital mindset with confidence in modern systems, automation tools, and data-driven workflows. 
 
 
 Excellent communication skills in English and native Hungarian (German is considered an advantage). 
 
 
 Highly independent, trustworthy, and committed to governance and compliance. 
 
 
 Structured, organized, detail-oriented working style with a focus on transparency. 
 
 
 Proactive, self-driven personality with strong negotiation and stakeholder-management skills. 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 -Competitive base salary aligned with your experience,  
 -Continuous technological expansion and innovation 
 -Stable international background with globally a recognized brand 
 -People-oriented, open work environment with a trustworthy and authentic company culture

jobs.title: CSS Associate, RTP EMEA
Field Application Engineer – Connected Vehicle Specialist (m/f)
jobs.description:
Join a rapidly expanding global innovator in the Internet of Vehicles (IoV) and smart mobility space. As this industry leader establishes its new European hub, we are seeking two technical pioneers to become the key face of their technology for the world's most prestigious automotive manufacturers (OEMs). 
 As a Connected Vehicle Specialist, you will ensure the seamless connectivity of next-generation smart cars. You will be the vital technical bridge between our R&D Headquarters and the engineering teams of European automotive giants. 
 
 
 Deep-Dive Troubleshooting: You’ll be the "detective" for complex 4G/5G connectivity issues. You will collect signaling logs on-site, analyze network behavior, and reproduce issues using advanced testing tools. 
 
 
 Strategic Technical Liaison: You’ll manage high-priority (P1/P2) incidents, ensuring clear communication between the OEM customers and our domestic development teams. 
 
 
 Technical Consulting: Beyond fixing issues, you will attend monthly OEM steering meetings, present performance reports, and identify "pain points" that our R&D team can turn into new features. 
 
 
 Product Evolution: You will introduce our latest IoV platforms to customers, gathering requirements that will shape the future of our product roadmap. 
 
 
 Future-Proofing Processes: You will oversee the incident management workflow (Jira), helping to automate data anonymization and streamline support operations. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 We are looking for a hybrid profile: a technical expert with the communication skills of a consultant. 
 
 
 Telco Expertise : Solid grasp of 4G/5G network architecture and signaling flows (Data, Voice, SMS). Experience with protocol analyzers (e.g., Wireshark) is essential. 
 
 
 Automotive Tech: You understand how a car talks to the cloud. Experience with T-Box, Telematics, or automotive connectivity is a huge plus. 
 
 
 Professional English: You are comfortable presenting technical solutions and writing business emails in English. 
 
 
 Proactive Mindset: You are a driver of solutions, not just a reporter of bugs. You can navigate complex corporate environments (OEMs) with confidence. 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
Benefits 
 
 
 Long-term Career Path: A unique chance to join a global tech company at the "ground floor" in Europe, with a planned transition to a permanent role. (Starting with a 12-month-long fix term temporary position with the opportunity with a real potential for joining the company as an employee after this period) 
 
 
 Cutting-Edge Tech: Work with the latest 5G and IoV (Internet of Vehicles) technologies. 
 
 
 Tier-1 Exposure: Direct collaboration with the world’s leading car manufacturers. 
 
 
 High Impact: You will be one of the first local employees, significantly shaping our European operations.

jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer

As we establish our new Hungarian subsidiary, we need a skilled and customer-focused Technical Support Engineer to ensure our customers receive world-class service and support. You will be a critical part of our local success. 
 As our Technical Support Engineer (acting as the Fulfillment Representative, FR), you will be the technical backbone of our operations in the CEE region. You will be responsible for ensuring the smooth installation, commissioning, and reliable operation of our equipment at customer sites. You will act as the key link between our customers and our global technical team, ensuring high-quality project delivery and customer satisfaction. 
 Key Responsibilities:

 Technical Problem Solving: o Efficiently diagnose and resolve on-site technical issues of medium to high complexity. o For complex problems, accurately identify the root cause and effectively escalate to the global technical team with clear documentation. 
 "Iron Triangle" Collaboration: 
 o Work closely with the local Sales Manager (AR) and HQ-based Solution Experts (SR) to ensure proposed solutions are feasible and deliverable. o Collect and feedback on-site customer needs, product issues, and application insights to the HQ product and R&D teams. 
 Local Knowledge Building: o Systematically document all service activities, solutions to common problems, and customer requests. o Contribute to building a localized knowledge base for the team. 
 Compliance & Spare Parts: o Assist in managing the local spare parts inventory. o Ensure all operations comply with EU (CE, etc.) and local Hungarian safety and regulatory requirements. 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 • Education: Bachelor's degree or above. Majors in Mechanical, Electrical, Automation Engineering, or a related technical field. • Experience: 3-5 years of hands-on field service experience with industrial equipment. Experience in project delivery or handling complex breakdowns is highly valued. • Technical Skills: o Solid understanding of electrical and mechanical principles; ability to read electrical schematics and mechanical drawings. o Proficient with various diagnostic tools and instruments. o Experience with laser equipment or automated production lines is a strong plus. 
 • Language Proficiency: Fluent in both English and Hungarian, capable of using them for on- site technical communication and report writing. 
 • Core Competencies: o Independent Problem-Solving: Excellent on-site analytical and hands-on diagnostic skills. o Customer Service Orientation: Patient, r

jobs.title: IT Security Engineer
jobs.description:
Our partner, Alpha FMC is bringing their impressive global success story to Hungary, building a brand-new Global Business Center in Budapest. They are looking for an IT Security Engineer to join their Technology function and become a foundational part of this journey. 
 They offer a unique environment that prioritizes an inclusive culture and service excellence from day one. In this role, you will be the guardian of the company’s digital assets within a collaborative, supportive, and social international team. It is a rare chance to join a community that values teamwork, celebrates success, and genuinely enjoys working together to build a fresh operation. 
   
 Security Operations & Incident Response 
 
 Monitor security alerts and logs (SIEM) to identify and investigate suspicious activities. 
 Manage the incident response lifecycle, from detection to containment and remediation. 
 Oversee the day-to-day operation of security tools, including endpoint protection (EDR), firewalls, and email security gateways. 
 
 Vulnerability Management & Infrastructure Protection 
 
 Conduct regular vulnerability scans and coordinate patching processes for operating systems and applications. 
 Maintain the security posture of our Azure cloud environment, ensuring configurations align with best practices. 
 Support network security initiatives, including VPN and firewall rule management. 
 
 Compliance & Assurance 
 
 Assist in the technical completion of client security due diligence questionnaires (DDQ). 
 Support internal and external audits by providing evidence and technical documentation related to ISO 27001 controls. 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 You have at least 2+ years of relevant experience in an IT Security or Network Security role. 
 You hold a recognized industry certification (e.g., CompTIA Security+, CEH, Microsoft Azure Security Engineer). 
 Solid knowledge of Azure cloud security, network protocols (TCP/IP), and endpoint protection technologies. 
 Experience with vulnerability management tools and SIEM solutions. 
 Business language fluency in English.

jobs.title: Kotlin/Java Backend Developer - Contracting
jobs.tags: Technology; IT; Software Development,Technology,Data & Advanced Analytics
jobs.description: A Hays IT Contracting B2B konstrukcióban működik . Célunk, hogy az IT szakértőket a piac legérdekesebb és legmodernebb technológiai projektjeivel kössük össze. Mire számíthatsz, ha velünk szerződsz vállalkozóként? •Összekötjük a megfelelő vállalkozókat a megfelelő projektekkel – aktív közvetítő szerepet vállalunk a vállalkozók és a partnereink között, az igények pontos összehangolásával. •Keressük a következő együttműködési lehetőségeket számodra – már a projektek lezárulta előtt, különböző iparágakban és cégméretekben. •Személyes kapcsolattartásra és érdekképviseletre – levesszük rólad az egyeztetések és pozicionálás terhét, és képviseljük az elvárásaidat az ügyfelek felé. •Támogatásra az óradíj sávok meghatározásában – hidat képezünk a piaci elvárások és a vállalkozói igények között, hogy reális és piacképes megállapodások szülessenek. A leendő környezeted Partnerünk egy elismert, nemzetközi projekteken dolgozó technológiai cég, akik ügyfeleik csapataival együtt építenek skálázható digitális megoldásokat. Kifejezetten nagy hangsúlyt fektetnek a mérnöki munka minőségére és az önálló, tudatos gondolkodásra. A rád váró feladatok •Backend alkalmazások tervezése, fejlesztése és folyamatos fejlesztése Kotlin alapokon •Skálázható, biztonságos és nagy teljesítményű rendszerek megvalósítása •Részvétel architekturális döntésekben, együttműködés senior fejlesztőkkel és architectekkel •Üzleti igények technikai megoldássá alakítása •Clean code elvek és modern fejlesztési gyakorlatok alkalmazása •Code review-kban való aktív részvétel •Új technológiák, megoldások kipróbálása és bevezetése Mire van szükséged a sikerhez? •Több éves tapasztalat backend fejlesztésben, erős Java/Kotlin tudással •Magabiztos rendszer és alkalmazásszintű gondolkodás •Skálázható backend rendszerek fejlesztésében szerzett tapasztalat •Elkötelezettség a minőségi, jól olvasható és karbantartható kód iránt •Felelősségteljes, önálló munkavégzés •Jó együttműködési készség csapaton belül és más szerepkörökkel •Kommunikációképes angol nyelvtudás nemzetközi projektekhez Érdekel a lehetőség, kérdéseid vannak? Kattints az „Apply now/"Jelentkezem" gombra, és küldd el CV-det! #LI-DNI #1197728 - Andrea Szalai

jobs.title: category buyer - indirect materials & services
jobs.description:
Our market-leading partner in the development and production of polymer-based products, which offers innovative system solutions in many areas, is looking for a new colleague to join its team in Biatorbágy. If you are looking for the challenges of an internationally recognized company with a stable background, this is the place for you!  
   
 In this role, you will be a key contributor to our partner’s category strategy, managing the end-to-end sourcing process and driving value through expert contract management and supplier negotiations. As a Category Buyer in operational sourcing (indirect materials & services) , you will execute tactical buying activities and manage contracts to deliver on category strategies. You will ensure operational excellence by navigating complex sourcing projects and maintaining high-performance standards across your assigned categories. 
   
 
 
 Responsible for contributing to strategy (support strategy development and drive implementation) for assigned categories.  
 
 
 Drive the sourcing process; prepare and execute RfX within defined boundaries, evaluate incoming offers, conduct negotiations with suppliers.  
 
 
 Determine optimal negotiation/award alternatives, award goods/services to supplier(s).  
 
 
 Manage contracts & supply issues, escalate supplier non-conformance to drive performance.  
 
 
 Ensure PVO transparency for assigned categories by correct material group classification.  
 
 
 Conduct reporting of results/performance.  
 
 
 Execute risk management approach with appropriate actions. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 Education: Bachelor’s degree in an economic or technical field.  
 
 
 Experience: 1 to 4 years of relevant work experience.  
 
 
 Languages: High-level proficiency in English AND German.  
 
 
 Software: Proficient in MS Office; knowledge of SAP is needed.  
 
 
 Expertise: Advanced knowledge of purchasing processes (S2C), sourcing techniques, and contract management.  
 
 
 Skills: Strong negotiation skills and the ability to reach agreements through flexibility and compromise.  
 
 
 Complexity: Proven ability to solve difficult, vaguely defined problems that require cross-disciplinary consideration.  
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 
 Competitive Cafeteria benefits package.  
 
 
 Provided work equipment: laptop and mobile phone.  
 
 
 Flexible work arrangement: 2 days remote work per week.  
 
 
 Supportive and transparent organizational culture.  
 
 
 Opportunity for international collaboration/work environment.

We are looking for a motivated Financial Accountant to join their close-knit, highly supportive Finance team of three. This role offers a truly exceptional work-life balance with a strict "no overtime" culture, a relaxed family-like atmosphere, and a beautiful modern riverside office featuring a rooftop terrace. 
   
 As a Financial Accountant, you will play a key role in the local finance operations, working closely with the Tax and Finance Manager and collaborating with international departments. 
   
 Financial Operations & Administration

 Languages: Fluent and confident English communication skills (both written and spoken) are a must, as you will be in daily contact with international colleagues. 
 
 
 Tech Skills: Advanced MS Office knowledge, with a strong focus on Excel. Previous experience with SAP is a strong advantage. 
 
 
 Soft Skills: Strong analytical mindset, proactive attitude, reliability, and an interest in process optimization. You are a team player who is eager to learn and grow.

 A strong compensation package based on your experience level.

 Premium Office Environment: A brand-new, modern riverside office in the 9th district with a rooftop terrace. 
 
 
 Extras: Company laptop and SIM card (available for private use as well), and 10

jobs.title: Application Engineer Intern – Java
jobs.description:
At BlackRock, they are all connected by one mission: to help more and more people experience financial well-being. The clients, and the people they serve, are saving for retirement, paying for their children’s educations, buying homes and starting businesses. Their investments also help to strengthen the global economy: support businesses small and large; finance infrastructure projects that connect and power cities; and facilitate innovations that drive progress. 
 This mission would not be possible without their smartest investment – the one they make in their employees. It’s why they’re dedicated to creating an environment where their colleagues feel welcomed, valued and supported with networks, benefits and development opportunities to help them thrive. 
 They build products and services to meet the needs of BlackRock and their clients. Their fintech culture and solutions help distinguish BlackRock as an industry leader in both asset management and cutting-edge technologies. The team is made up of software engineers, data scientists, data engineers, quant developers, DevOps engineers, product managers, business analysts, UX engineers, UX designers and more, all working to drive innovation in the financial services industry. 
 Feladatok:
 
 Take emotional ownership of projects and developing at scale in the enterprise environment used by thousands of users 
 Work with senior engineers and have immediate impact on the development of the Aladdin platform 
 Collaborate with users and the product team to design & implement new features 
 Use all that cool tech that you have heard about like Snowflake, Spark, Storm, Solr, and more 
 Gain a broad understanding of the investment process and the capabilities of Aladdin 
 Express your ingenuity by teaming up and joining firm-wide Hackathons 
 Bring your authentic self to work and find your community through volunteering, employee and professional networks, and every-day interactions 
 
 Elvárások:
 
 The position is open for applicants with active or passive student status with expected university graduation in the summer of 2027 
 Ongoing studies in Computer Science or related field 
 Strong proficiency in both written and spoken English 
 Genuine interest in finance and financial technologies 
 Practical experience with Java programming 
 Collaborative team player with excellent communication skills 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities 
 Critical thinking and technical curiosity 
 Adaptable, proactive, and resilient in a fast-paced environment 
 
 Munkaidő:
 
 Availability to work at least 25 hours per week 
 Long-term development opportunity 
 Available to start immediately or no later than June 2026 
 
 Amit kínálunk:
 
 2950 Ft/hour in gross 
 Opportunity to partly work from home 
 Internship confirmation 
 Potential to work towards a relevant professional qualification 
 Join one of the world’s leading asset management firms 
 
 If you are interested in this position, please fill out

jobs.title: Platform Operation Specialist
jobs.description:
Our partner, Hungary's largest agricultural machinery manufacturing company, is looking for a new colleague for the  Platform Operator role. 
 
 Design, implement, and manage cloud-native platforms, both on-premises and cloud-based, with focus on Kubernetes. 
 Automate the lifecycle of our platforms using Infrastructure as Code and further automation approaches and technologies as needed. 
 Establishing governance processes for secure operation in the Kubernetes environment. 
 Closely collaborate with other IT specialists, especially in the IT infrastructure 
 Consult development teams and application owners in integrating their applications into our platforms. 
 Develop and document operational procedures and best practices. 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 A degree or diploma in computer science and professional experience. 
 A passion for designing and implementing complex, automated, and scalable platforms with a security mindset. 
 Proven experience in the areas of container technology or cloud infrastructure. 
 Experience with linux and network technology is desirable. 
 Team player with strong analytical thinking skills, a structured approach to work, and a high level of personal responsibility. 
 Ability to think comprehensively, independently identify optimization potential, and have the confidence to implement it. 
 Ability to prepare and communicate complex issues in a way that is appropriate for the audience. 
 Very good verbal and written communication skills in English 
 Communication skills in German are a plus. 
 Willingness to travel abroad occasionally for special topics (i.e. on-site workshops; max. once per quarter) 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 Fast growing company with strong and stable international background 
 Interesting company scope with improvement opportunities 
 Market level compensation package 
 Inspiring work atmosphere 
 Great team work and familiar company culture 
 Opportunity for joining a new Hungarian team with great ambitions 
 Hybrid working model (around 10% onsite)

jobs.title: Project Management Specialist
jobs.description:
Alpha is bringing their impressive global success story to Hungary, building a brand-new Global Business Center in Budapest. They are looking for a Project Management Specialist to join their Change (Operations) team and become a foundational part of this journey. 
 They offer a unique environment where you have a real impact—your work is not limited by strict process descriptions. With their meritocratic approach, you will find meaningful work and be part of a culture that builds and grows together. If you want to put your stamp on a fresh operation in the heart of Budapest, your next chapter starts here. Join a collaborative community of professionals. 
 As a key member of the Business Services function, you won’t just execute tasks—you’ll empower the long-term success of the Group. While consultants focus on delivering client value, you will ensure the company runs on a base that is efficient, innovative, and compliant. Within the Change team, you will bridge the gap between business problems and strategic solutions, taking ownership of the processes that enable global growth. 
 Your Responsibilities 
 
 
 Lead the gathering of business requirements and drive initiatives to solve complex operational problems. 
 
 
 Partner with Change Managers to provide essential PMO support for integration projects, taking full ownership of specific workstreams. 
 
 
 Collaborate with Business Operations teams on strategic technology, governance, and operational initiatives. 
 
 
 Manage and own key Business Support processes, including client engagement (RFP and DDQ completion) and business analysis forums (Design Authorities, Working Groups). 
 
 
 Develop a deep understanding of the business model and industry to handle increasingly complex projects and deliver tangible impact for the Group. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 We are looking for an ambitious professional who balances technical precision with a collaborative, team-first mindset. 
 Requirements: 
 
 2–3 years of proven experience in business analysis, business support, project management, or consulting. 
 Demonstrated experience in change and project management, including leading support processes like RFPs or systems design authorities. 
 A strong understanding of diverse business processes and the ability to solve problems creatively. 
 Business language fluency in English (verbal and written) with first-class presentation and interpersonal skills. 
 You are comfortable in a fast-moving corporate environment and focus on team achievement over individual goals. 
 Proficient business user of MS Office, specifically PowerPoint and Excel. 
 
   
 Great to have: 
 
 Relevant professional certifications (e.g., Project Management). 
 Experience in Professional or Financial Services. 
 Understanding of data analysis techniques or process improvement methodologies. 
 Exposure to digital transformation or large-scale system implementations. 
 
   
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
Why Join Us in Budapest?

jobs.title: SAP GTS IT-Consultant
jobs.description:
We are searching for an experienced SAP GTS Consultant to support our Global IT team in managing all IT processes and solutions for the Customs & Foreign Trade business department. 
 -         - You will be responsible for the analysis, harmonization and optimization of integrated customs and trade compliance processes in SAP GTS and connected systems. 
 -         - You will prepare and implement solutions for business requirements via Customizing and the creation of technical specifications for IT developers. 
 -         - You will be part of national and international projects teams in the role of an IT-consultant, IT sub-project or project manager. 
 -         - You will be responsible for coordinating, prioritizing and estimating IT demands together with the foreign trade business process owner. 
 -         - Moderating workshops, creating IT concepts and training material will also be part of your job. 
 -         - In case of incidents or problems, you will support our Customs & Foreign Trade business users. 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
   
 -         - You have successfully completed a degree in business administration, business informatics or a comparable qualification. 
 -         - Extensive experience as an SAP GTS IT consultant (inhouse or external) or as an SAP GTS business expert. 
 -         - Comprehensive process knowledge about customs and trade compliance in an industrial company. 
 -         - You have professional technical know-how in SAP GTS processes, system customizing and configuration. 
 -         - You are able to create technical concepts for IT developers so they can implement custom code solutions in SAP GTS based on that. 
 -         - You have very good communication skills in English (verbal and written) and ideally also in German. 
 -         - You are an analytical and creative team player, have a high degree of initiative and are characterized by reliability and willingness to learn. 
 -        - Willingness to travel to our headquarter in Germany (~ 10%) 
   
 è Expectations too high? Don't hesitate to apply, as we value potential and are open to considering candidates with a willingness to learn and grow. 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 International environment 
 Individually tailored training possibilities 
 Attractive fringe benefits 
 Full home-office

jobs.title: Software Engineer - HealthTech (all genders)
jobs.description:
WERDE TEIL UNSERER MISSION 
 Bei PLANFOX gestalten wir die digitale Zukunft des Gesundheitswesens. Wir entwickeln smarte und vernetzte Softwarelösungen, die Prozesse vereinfachen, Informationsqualität verbessern und mehr Zeit für das Wesentliche schaffen – die Menschen. Entstanden aus einer Forschungskooperation der Universität Augsburg und mit Wurzeln in der XITASO Unternehmensgruppe verbinden wir wissenschaftliche Expertise mit technologischem Know-how und Leidenschaft für digitale Gesundheit. 
 DIESE AUFGABEN ERWARTEN DICH 
 
 Du arbeitest gemeinsam mit dem Team an der Full-Stack-Entwicklung unserer Anwendungen auf Basis von React, Node.js und PostgreSQL 
 Du verantwortest die Umsetzung in einer vollständig auf TypeScript basierenden Codebasis 
 Du wirkst als Mitglied eines kleinen, agilen Teams ohne starre Rollen aktiv an der Gestaltung unserer Produktlandschaft mit – von der ersten Idee bis zur erfolgreichen Umsetzung 
 Du treibst die Digitalisierung des Gesundheitswesens mit nutzerfreundlicher und praxisnaher Software voran 
 Du entwickelst robuste und sichere Softwarearchitekturen , die höchsten Anforderungen an Datenschutz und Informationssicherheit im Umgang mit sensiblen Gesundheitsdaten gerecht werden 
 Du arbeitest in einem deutschsprachigen und verteilten Team 
 
 DAS ZEICHNET DICH AUS 
 
 Du verfügst über signifikante Entwicklungserfahrung in agilen Teams und bringst diese sicher in unsere gemeinsame Produktentwicklung ein 
 Du arbeitest dich gerne tief in neue Technologien und komplexe technische Fragestellungen ein 
 Du hast Freude an typsicherer Programmierung im funktionalen Stil 
 Du bringst Kenntnisse zu FHIR oder anderen Health-Tech-Schnittstellen mit und kannst dieses Wissen gezielt einsetzen 
 Du denkst über den Code hinaus und berücksichtigst Aspekte wie Security, Schnittstellendesign, Infrastruktur und Monitoring als integrale Bestandteile deiner Arbeit 
 Du gehst lösungs- und ergebnisorientiert vor und behältst dabei stets das große Ganze im Blick 
 Du fühlst dich in einer vollständig remote organisierten Arbeitsumgebung wohl und arbeitest eigenverantwortlich sowie zuverlässig 
 
 DAS BIETEN WIR 
 
 Gestaltungsspielraum und Verantwortung , um die Weiterentwicklung von PLANFOX entscheidend mitzuprägen 
 Ein motiviertes und herzliches Team , das dich unterstützt und gemeinsam mit dir wächst 
 Flexible Arbeitsgestaltung durch ein transparentes Gleitzeitmodell , welches dir Freiraum für eine gute Balance zwischen Beruf und Privatleben lässt 
 Eine offene, wertschätzende Start-up-Kultur mit flachen Hierarchien und schnellen Entscheidungswegen 
 Eine sinnstiftende Aufgabe mit spürbarem Impact, bei der du die Digitalisierung des Gesundheitssystems aktiv mitgestaltest 
 30 Urlaubstage, ein persönliches Weiterbildungsbudget und zusätzliche Benefits, die dir Raum für Wachstum und Erholung geben 
 
 DEINE ANSPRECHPARTNERIN 
 Julia Ondra 
 Find more English Speaking Jobs in Germany on Arbeitnow

jobs.title: category management supervisor
jobs.description:
Our market-leading partner in the development and production of polymer-based products, which offers innovative system solutions in many areas, is looking for a new colleague to join its team in Biatorbágy. If you are looking for the challenges of an internationally recognized company with a stable background, this is the place for you!  
   
 In this role, you will act as a vital partner to our partner’s demand carriers, focusing on developing high-impact category strategies and value-capturing plans. As a  Category Management Supervisor , you are accountable for the end-to-end development of category strategies. You will drive category performance, manage strategic supplier relationships, and identify market opportunities to optimize costs and mitigate risks. 
   
 
 
 Accountable and responsible for category strategy development and alignment with Business Units.  
 
 
 Accountable for driving and reporting of category performance / results; develop, define, implement and measure cost optimization measures.  
 
 
 Track market trends and supplier markets; identify and evaluate category opportunities and risks.  
 
 
 Define risk management approach and appropriate actions.  
 
 
 Develop category strategy: define strategic goals, target supplier portfolio, global implementation plans and KPIs.  
 
 
 Manage relationship with key / strategic suppliers.  
 
 
 Monitor strategy implementation: tackle action items in regions, track commodity performance, inform Business Unit representatives.  
 
 
 Accountable for defintion of buying guide and buying channel; assure continuous information and communication flow within PUR network and share best practice.  
 
 Lead and develop a team of three professionals, ensuring performance management, skill development, and alignment with departmental goals. 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 Education: Bachelor’s degree in an economic or technical field, such as Business Administration or Industrial Engineering. 
 
 
 Experience: 4 to 7 years of relevant professional experience.  
 
 Specialization: Practical experience in managing air, sea, parcel, and land freight services category. 
 
 Languages: High-level proficiency in English AND German.  
 
 
 Software: Proficient in MS Office; knowledge of SAP is needed.  
 
 
 Essential Expertise: Advanced knowledge of purchasing processes (focus on S2P), strategy development, supplier and risk management, and business partner management. 
 
 
 Communication Skills: Ability to influence change and reach solutions through persuasion, even when faced with conflicting external objectives. 
 
 
 Problem Solving: Proven ability to handle difficult, vaguely defined problems that require cross-disciplinary understanding. 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 
 Competitive Cafeteria benefits package.  
 
 
 Provided work equipment: laptop and mobile phone.  
 
 
 Flexible work arrangement: 2 days remote work per week.  
 
 
 Supportive and transparent organizational culture.

jobs.title: Consultative Sales Professional

 End-to-End Enterprise Sales: Own the full sales lifecycle from prospecting to closure, consistently hitting revenue targets through proactive new business acquisition . 
 
 
 C-Level Advisory: Build and maintain trusted advisor relationships with executive stakeholders, navigating complex multi-stakeholder buying committees.

 Consultative Solution Design: Conduct structured needs analyses to co-create AI transformation strategies that deliver measurable ROI for enterprise clients. 
 
 
 Global Market Expansion: Develop and manage cross-border opportunities across the US, EU, and GCC markets , handling regional compliance and negotiation dynamics. 
 
 
 Strategic Networking: Leverage an extensive professional network to build alliances with consulting firms and technology partners for joint go-to-market initiatives. 
 
 
 Sales Discipline & Governance: Maintain rigorous CRM hygiene and funnel mathematics to ensure forecasting accuracy and transparent pipeline reporting. 
 
 
 Market Thought Leadership: Represent the company at international events and contribute to AI-focused marketing insights and executive briefings. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 Elite Enterprise Sales Track Record: 5+ years of experience in consultative selling (AI, SaaS, or Digital Transformation) with a documented history of hitting targets and acquiring new logos. 
 
 
 RFP & Grant Funding Expertise: Proven success in winning complex tenders and securing HU/EU innovation grants or funding from international institutional bodies. 
 
 
 C-Suite Executive Presence: Exceptional negotiation skills and the confidence to act as a peer to C-level stakeholders in high-stakes deal environments. 
 
 
 Extensive Strategic Network: A robust, active professional network (domestic and international) that can be leveraged to accelerate deal cycles . 
 
 
 Analytical Sales Governance: A data-driven mindset focused on funnel mathematics , pipeline predictability, and disciplined CRM management. 
 
 
 AI & Tech Fluency: Ability to bridge the gap between technical architecture (APIs, AI models) and strategic business value for the client. 
 
 
 Ownership & Resilience: An entrepreneurial "owner" mentality with total accountability for the sales process from lead generation to final contract. 
 
 
 Global Mobility & Growth Mindset: Readiness for international travel and a commitment to continuous learning in the rapidly evolving AI landscape. 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 
 Career Growth 
 
 
 Collaborative Team 
 
 
 Exciting Pr

jobs.title: Frontend fejlesztő gyakornok
jobs.description:
A SURVIOT Monitoring Kft. egy 2022-ben alapított, magyar tulajdonú startup, amely szerkezeti épség monitoringgal foglalkozik. Mérnöki okosórát fejleszt az épített környezet számára. Innovatív rendszerük valós idejű, pontos és megbízható adatokat szolgáltat épületek, hidak és egyéb szerkezetek állapotáról. Céljuk, hogy ügyfeleik időben, biztonságosan és költséghatékonyan hozhassanak döntéseket. 
 A cég egyedülálló technológiáját először az M85 autópálya alagútépítésénél alkalmazták, ahol sikeresen támogatták a problémák gyors felismerését és a biztonság növelését. 
 Feladatok:
 
 Meglévő React alapú alkalmazások fejlesztése és továbbfejlesztése 
 Frontend komponensek és funkciók implementálása TypeScript környezetben 
 Meglévő kódbázis megértése, refaktorálási feladatok támogatása 
 Állapotkezelési és API-integrációs feladatok támogatása 
 UI komponensek fejlesztése Material UI használatával 
 Tesztelési és dokumentációs feladatok támogatása 
 Fejlesztői csapat munkájának támogatása agilis környezetben 
 
 Elvárások:
 
 Folyamatban lévő, nappali tagozatos, felsőfokú tanulmányok informatikai vagy kapcsolódó területen 
 React fejlesztési tapasztalat 
 Magabiztos TypeScript ismeret 
 Precíz, önálló munkavégzés 
 Magabiztos angoltudás írásban és szóban 
 Nyitottság meglévő rendszerek és komplexebb kódbázisok megértésére 
 Jó problémamegoldó készség 
 Kreatív, rugalmas és önálló hozzáállás 
 
 Munkaidő:
 
 Hétfőtől péntekig heti átlag 16-25 órában 
 Rugalmas, tanulmányokhoz igazított beosztásban 
 Munkavégzés formája: 95% home office, 5% budapesti iroda/rendezvények 
 
 Amit kínálunk:
 
 Bruttó 2.500 Ft-os órabér 
 Valódi betekintés egy gyorsan növekvő startup életébe 
 Szakmai gyakorlat leigazolása 
 Fiatalos, támogató csapat 
 Izgalmas iparági rendezvényeken való részvétel, kapcsolatépítési lehetőségekkel 
 Hosszú távú diákmunka-lehetőség 
 
 Előnyt jelent:
 
 Mapbox-gl vagy deck.gl ismerete 
 Térképes webalkalmazások fejlesztésében szerzett tapasztalat 
 DevOps alapok (GitHub / GitLab CI) 
 Docker és containerizációs ismeretek 
 AWS vagy cloud alapú architektúrák alapismerete 
 UI/UX érdeklődés, Figma vagy Sketch tapasztalat 
 
 Ha magadra ismertél, nincs egyéb teendőd, mint kitölteni az alábbi űrlapunkat és egy fényképes önéletrajz feltöltésével véglegesíteni a jelentkezésed. Amennyiben kérdésed adódott, bátran keresd a pozícióhoz megadott kapcsolattartót.

jobs.title: Payroll Specialist
jobs.description:
A világpiacvezető Randstad magyarországi csapatába keresünk precizitás iránt elkötelezett medior vagy senior bérszámfejtőt , aki a 100%-os pontosság mellett partnerként támogatja ügyfeleinket. Nálunk a globális háttér közvetlen, támogató légkörrel párosul, ahol teret adunk innovatív ötleteidnek és valódi figyelmet fordítunk a munka-magánélet egyensúlyára. Ha stabil szakmai bázist és konstruktív közösséget keresel, nálunk a helyed! 
 
 
 Teljes körű bérszámfejtési folyamatok menedzselése fizikai és szellemi kölcsönzött munkavállalók részére. 
 
 
 Társadalombiztosítási kifizetőhelyi feladatok precíz és naprakész ellátása. 
 
 
 Munkaviszony létesítésével és megszüntetésével kapcsolatos bérügyi feladatok, hatósági bejelentések kezelése. 
 
 
 Szakmai tanácsadás és kapcsolattartás: ügyfeleink, munkavállalóink és a hatóságok támogatása bérszámfejtéssel kapcsolatos kérdésekben. 
 
 
 aktív részvétel a bérszámfejtési rendszerek fejlesztésében és a hatékonyabb munkamódszerek kialakításában. 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 Rendelkezel bérszámfejtő és társadalombiztosítási ügyintézői végzettséggel, valamint 3 év releváns szakmai tapasztalattal.  
 
 
 Magabiztosan használod a Nexon bérszámfejtő programot (Nexon4 ismeret előny) és az Excel/Word szoftvereket. 
 
 
 Érdekelnek a modern megoldások, és az AI alkalmazása is komfortos számodra a munkavégzés során. 
 
 
 Igényes vagy a munkádra, számodra a precizitás alapvető érték. 
 
 
 Ügyfélközpontú, segítőkész és kiegyensúlyozott személyiség vagy, aki szóban és írásban is képes szakmai partnerként fellépni. 
 
 
 Proaktív, megoldásfókuszú szemlélet jellemez, aki tudatosan gazdálkodik az idejével, és szeret csapatban dolgozni. 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 
 Heti 3 nap Home Office lehetőség és odafigyelés a munka-magánélet egyensúlyára. 
 
 
 Nálunk akár plusz 4 nappal is növelheted az éves szabadságaid számát. 
 
 
 Éves bónusz (egyéni és céges teljesítmény alapján), Cafeteria és prémium magánegészségügyi biztosítás. 
 
 
 Tudásmegosztáson alapuló, elhivatott és támogató szakmai csapat. 
 
 
 Környezet: Modern, inspiráló irodai háttér és stabil nemzetközi vállalati háttér.

jobs.title: Finance Automation Developer
jobs.description: Finance Automation Developer Budapest • Hibrid munkavégzés • Modern pénzügyi automatizáció és folyamatfejlesztés Egy olyan szervezethez csatlakozhatsz, amely Európa-szerte támogatja nagyvállalatok működését, és folyamatosan bővíti szolgáltatóközponti jelenlétét Budapesten. A csapat célja, hogy modern, hatékony és skálázható pénzügyi folyamatokat építsen, miközben magas szintű technológiai támogatást nyújt a nemzetközi üzlet számára. Finance Automation Fejlesztőként kulcsszereped lesz a pénzügyi riportálási és folyamatfejlesztési területe n : modernizálod a meglévő automatizmusokat, új megoldásokat építesz, és technikai tanácsadóként támogatod a transzformációs projekteket. A csapat életében egy ez kulcspozíció, amely hosszútávú fejlődési lehetőséget kínál a megoldás-architektúra irányába. Feladataid: Automatizmusok újragondolása és modernizálása Meglévő Excel/VBA megoldások logikájának feltérképezése majd korszerű, fenntartható automatizációk kialakítása a csapat sztenderdjei szerint. Stabil és megbízható folyamatok építése Olyan automatizmusok fejlesztése, amelyek átlátható hibakezeléssel, részletes naplózással és jól definiált helyreállítási lépésekkel működnek, minimális manuális beavatkozást igényelve. Feldolgozó botok fejlesztése és üzemeltetése VBA vagy Python‑alapú botok készítése nagy volumenű pénzügyi folyamatokhoz (pl. SAP adatkinyerés, adattranszformáció), dokumentált futtatási útmutatókkal és kontroll pontokkal. Agilis munkavégzés Jól definiált backlog feladatok átvétele, tiszta és dokumentált logika implementálása, valamint részvétel a tesztelési és élesítési folyamatokban. Együttműködés a technikai build csapattal Szoros kooperáció a Lead Analytics Engineerrel és a BI fejlesztővel, a kialakított architektúrák, irányelvek és technikai sztenderdek mentén. Téged keresünk, ha… Hibrid profil vagy: pénzügyi/controlling háttérrel rendelkezel, de erős technológiai érdeklődéssel és „builder” szemlélettel. Automatizációs tapasztalattal bírsz: dolgoztál már low‑code eszközökkel (Power Automate, Power Apps) vagy scripteléssel (VBA, Python). Értesz a VBA‑hoz: képes vagy meglévő VBA kódot értelmezni és modernebb, fenntarthatóbb megoldásra átültetni. Magabiztos vagy adatkezelésben: SAP kivonatok és komplex adatállományok strukturálása, validálása és hibakeresése Power Query segítségével nem okoz gondot. Erős hibakeresési szemlélettel dolgozol: nemcsak megoldod a problémát, hanem gondoskodsz arról is, hogy ne forduljon elő újra. A munkakörnyezet: Modern, open office kialakítás Zöld belső park, kellemes közösségi terek Fiatalos, dinamikus csapat Igényes, jól felszerelt iroda Juttatások és előnyök: Cafeteria Medicare egészségbiztosítási csomag Nyelvi kurzusok és szakmai tréningek Negyedéves bónusz Belső karrierút: évente kétszer lehet jelentkezni horizontális vagy vertikális pozíciókra Rugalmas munkaidő, törzsidővel Hibrid munkavégzés: heti 2 nap iroda, 3 nap home-office Ha érdekel ez a pozíció, kattints az Apply now gombra, és küldd el önéletrajzodat, vagy hívj telefonon és szívesen megosztjuk Veled a részleteket. #LI-DNI #1199308 - Klara Karadi

jobs.title: Application Developer (Salesforce)
jobs.description:
Our partner, Alpha FMC is bringing their impressive UK success story to Hungary, building a brand-new Global Business Center in Budapest. They are looking for a skilled Application Developer to focus on Salesforce CRM development while contributing to broader software projects. They offer a unique environment that prioritizes an inclusive culture and service excellence from day one. In this role, you will design and build robust digital solutions within a collaborative, supportive, and social international team. It is a rare chance to join a community that values teamwork, celebrates success, and genuinely enjoys working together to build a fresh operation. 
 
 
 Salesforce Development: Design, develop, and deploy Salesforce solutions, including custom objects, workflows, Apex triggers, Lightning components, and Visualforce pages. 
 
 
 Cross-Platform Coding: Develop and maintain applications using other programming languages and frameworks (e.g., JavaScript) for both backend and frontend projects. 
 
 
 Integrations: Integrate Salesforce with other enterprise systems and SaaS applications, assisting in designing APIs and data models. 
 
 
 Quality Assurance: Write unit tests, perform code reviews, troubleshoot software defects, and create clear technical documentation.

jobs.title: Close to Report Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you an ambitious finance passionate with 1-2 years of experience and seeking to step into a more complex role? We are looking for a Close to Report Specialist to join our multinational manufacturing Partner’s positive and ambitious finance team of 9. You will have full ownership of your tasks while collaborating closely with local and international finance departments. 
 
 
 General Ledger & Assets: Manage project and fixed asset accounting, create journals, and perform revaluations, remeasurements, and allocations 
 
 
 Month-End Excellence: Perform GL account reconciliations and drive month-end closing processes (plus support for year-end preparation) 
 
 
 Reporting & Analysis: Prepare ad-hoc reports to support internal business units and treasury operations 
 
 
 Audit Support: Prepare documentation and actively participate in both internal and external audits 
 
 
 Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional departments to ensure all predefined deadlines are met with precision 
 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 
 Education: Bachelor’s degree, preferably in Finance, Accounting, or a related Economic discipline 
 
 
 Experience: 2–3 years of experience in a multinational/SSC environment, or at least 1 year of solid finance experience 
 
 
 Languages: Fluency in English is essential for daily communication 
 
 
 Technical Skills: Advanced MS Office knowledge (especially Excel) 
 
 
 Soft Skills: Outstanding customer orientation, a strong team-player attitude, and the ability to handle strict month-end deadlines with a positive mindset 
 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 
 Excellent internal movement opportunities and a highly senior team to learn from 
 
 
 Multinational and very welcoming environment 
 
 
 Hybrig working model 
 
 
 Competitive salary and benefit package 
 
 
 A flexible and adaptive working environment

jobs.title: Cluster Accountant
jobs.description:
Our client is a leading global company in the sector of high-temperature industrial solutions and refractory materials. Operating in over 30 countries with thousands of employees worldwide, the company provides mission-critical services to the steel, cement, and energy industries. 
 On behalf of our partner, we are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced professional for the position of Cluster Accountant. 
 In this role, the successful candidate will be responsible for supporting the controlling function for a designated group of companies. This position is crucial for ensuring accurate financial reporting, maintaining balance sheet integrity, and ensuring full compliance with all regulatory, tax, and audit requirements. 
 
 Review and verify monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Working Capital) for accuracy. 
 Manage month-end closing processes and analyze variances in revenue, costs, and inventory. 
 Collaborate with shared service centers to ensure timely and high-quality data provision. 
 Oversee balance sheet reconciliations and ensure timely resolution of aged items. 
 Manage audit requirements by reviewing evidence, ensuring completeness, and liaising with auditors. 
 Lead the review and finalization of local annual accounts, tax returns, and local audits. 
 Review and approve indirect tax returns (e.g., VAT) in line with compliance regulations. 
 
 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 Degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field; professional qualification (e.g., ACCA, CIMA) is advantageous. 
 Minimum of 5 years of experience in accounting, controlling, or finance within a multinational environment. 
 Thorough understanding of P&L management, balance sheet handling, statutory reporting, and tax compliance. 
 Experience in managing audits and collaborating with external auditors. 
 Strong analytical, problem-solving skills, and a high degree of precision. 
 Effective collaboration and communication skills for working with shared service centers. 
 Advanced proficiency with complex ERP/accounting systems and Excel. 
 Fluent English; knowledge of an additional European language is a plus. 
 
 Amit nyújtunk / Benefits 
 
 Competitive base salary 
 Annual bonus 
 Monthly cafeteria contribution 
 Private health insurance 
 Life insurance 
 Commuting allowance 
 Opportunities for career development and advancement 
 Extensive training and development programs

jobs.title: IT Service Management Architect - (ServiceNow/Jira/Freshservice/any)
jobs.description:

 Rendszer működésének és licenchasználatának monitorozása 
 Szolgáltatáskatalógus minőségének és standardizáltságának biztosítása 
 Felhasználó- és jogosultságkezelés

 Elvárások / Requirements 
 
 Informatikai, számítástechnikai vagy kapcsolódó területen szerzett BSc/MSc diploma
